llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 6.1 pulled due to Trustee Marquez absence. President Lawson stated: 'With Cecilia absent, we wanted to pull 6.1 and we can go over those when she's here to add to the discussion.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So that brings us to our consent calendar. I'll make a motion to approve. Second. All those in favor? Aye.
